source_pr.title: executor: accelerate TestShowVar
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/24130
 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:
Use `show variables where variable_name in (all the var_names)` instead of quering `show variables like var_name` every time.

How it Works:

Before:
``` shell
$ GO111MODULE=on go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f TestShowVar

ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        107.733s
```

After:
``` shell
$ GO111MODULE=on go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race -check.f TestShowVar

ok      github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor        7.621s
```

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- No code

Side effects

N/A

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
